title: Looking for Hotel Manager at Swiggy Restaurant Partners Advisory Limited

jsonLd.title: Looking for Hotel Manager at Swiggy Restaurant Partners Advisory Limited
jsonLd.description:
Swiggy Restaurant Partners Advisory Limited is actively seeking a talented and motivated Hotel Manager to join our dynamic team in Ahmedabad. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Swiggy Restaurant Partners Advisory Limited:
Swiggy Restaurant Partners Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs
• Assist in menu planning, costing, and food festival coordination
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Housekeeping Standards
• Proficiency in Travel Management
• Proficiency in GDS Systems
• Proficiency in HACCP
• Proficiency in Yield Management
• Proficiency in Crisis Management
• Proficiency in Event Management
• Proficiency in Barista Skills

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Learning & development budget
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Swiggy Restaurant Partners Advisory Limited!
